ESP32 (Xtensa LX6).notes: No FPU on base ESP32. Float ops are slow — INT8 strongly recommended.

ESP32-S3 (Xtensa LX7).notes: Has vector extensions. Better for ML than base ESP32.

STM32F4 (Cortex-M4).notes: Has FPU. Widely used for embedded ML. Good balance of cost and performance.

STM32H7 (Cortex-M7).notes: High performance MCU. The M7 core you used with Genx320 at IISc.

Arduino Uno (ATmega328P).notes: Almost no ML capability. Listed for reference — avoid deploying any neural network here.
